GetChats:
query GetChats {
  getChats: alertsWithAds(type: INBOX) {
    chats: alertsWithAds {
      ...chatAlert
      ... on BingAd {
        ouAdId
        adExperimentId
        adNetwork
        adRequestId
        contentUrl
        experimentDataHash
        imageUrl
        impressionFeedbackUrl
        impressionUrls
        viewableImpressionUrls
        itemName
        lowPrice
        price
        sellerName
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

fragment chatAlert on Alert {
  id
  actionPath
  contentThumbnails
  dateAdded
  displayAvatar
  eventMetadata
  notificationSource
  notificationText
  objectId
  pinned
  read
  seen
  sender {
    id
    profile {
      avatars {
        squareImage
        __typename
      }
      firstName
      isAutosDealer
      isBusinessAccount
      isPremium
      isTruyouVerified
      notActive
      avatarBadges {
        primaryBadge
        secondaryBadge
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  title
  type
  visualTags {
    displayText
    tag
    type
    __typename
  }
  listingId
  properties {
    name
    value
    __typename
  }
  unreadBadgeCount
  __typename
}
